title: rubus neoviburnifolius
intro: Rubus neoviburnifolius, also known as the New Broom Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus neoviburnifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
